jobs.title: Senior AI Product Engineer
jobs.description: Role Overview : As a Senior AI Product Engineer, you will work across product, engineering, customer workflows, and AI-native systems to rapidly build and scale enterprise applications. You will own problems end-to-end : - Understanding customer pain points - Designing workflows - Building prototypes - Shipping production systems - Iterating based on real-world feedback This is a high-ownership engineering role with strong product involvement. We are looking for engineers who naturally think like builders. What You'll Do : - Design and build end-to-end product experiences and systems - Work directly with customers and internal teams to understand operational workflows - Rapidly prototype and iterate using modern AI development tools - Build production-grade applications and internal platforms - Contribute across frontend, backend, workflows, APIs, automation, and AI-assisted systems - Use AI tools aggressively to accelerate development, experimentation, and iteration - Drive product direction through technical and product intuition - Identify opportunities for automation and simplification across workflows - Help shape the future architecture of AI-native enterprise applications What We're Looking For : We are specifically looking for engineers who : - Have 6+ years of engineering experience Have built products or systems end-to-end - Have worked on projects with real users, customers, or monetization - Build side projects, experiments, tools, or products outside of work - Actively use AI tools in their daily workflow - Have strong product intuition alongside technical depth - Enjoy high ownership and fast execution - Are comfortable working across multiple parts of the stack - Prefer building and shipping over process-heavy environments Strong Signals - We value engineers who have : - Built and launched independent products or startups - Monetized side projects or tools - Created internal tools that improved workflows significantly - Used AI tools to dramatically increase development velocity - Strong curiosity around AI-native software development - Demonstrated ability to move from idea prototype production quickly Technologies Workflows You may work with : - AI-assisted development tools - Large language model workflows - Full-stack product systems - Enterprise SaaS applications - Video AI and operational intelligence platforms - APIs, automation systems, and distributed infrastructure Experience with tools such as : - ChatGPT Claude Cursor Replit Lovable v0 GitHub Copilot - AI coding agents is highly valued. Successful engineers in this role : - Ship quickly and iterate continuously - Think deeply about customer workflows and usability - Build systems with strong product intuition - Use AI to meaningfully improve execution speed - Operate independently with high ownership - Contribute beyond pure implementation into product direction and strategy Experience Range : 6 - 10 years Educational Qualifications : B.Tech/B
